_about: Voice line copy + voice assignment for all 39 aliens. Each alien gets a line for the three move-quality buckets the game computes (great_move ≥40% eliminated, okay_move 15-39%, bad_move <15%) plus found_me when narrowed to 1. Line variety comes from a pool-rotation across aliens; voice variety comes from per-alien voice assignment.

lines.great_move: Oh no — half my hideouts are gone!
lines.bad_move: Almost no progress. I'm comfortable.

lines.great_move: Yikes, you're cutting through my friends fast!
lines.bad_move: You'll have to do better than that.

lines.great_move: The walls are closing in. I'm in trouble.
lines.okay_move: Not bad. The list is shrinking.
lines.bad_move: At this rate, I like my chances for escape!

lines.great_move: I'm running out of room to hide!
lines.okay_move: I have time to finish my lunch before you find me.
lines.bad_move: Was that even a useful question?

lines.great_move: Big move. The list is shrinking fast.
lines.okay_move: Decent move. I'm getting a bit nervous.
lines.bad_move: Barely a scratch. I'm laughing.

lines.great_move: You're getting too warm. Way too warm.
lines.bad_move: Try again, earthling.
